business_task: Determine whether the reliability-weighted association between food insecurity and diagnosed diabetes survives the registered six-module state audit.

scope.geography: 50 states and the District of Columbia

evidence_and_cohorts.complete_case: Selected direct health values are nonsuppressed and nonmissing; diagnosed_diabetes sample_size and selected median_income are nonmissing; never zero-fill.
evidence_and_cohorts.weight_rule: Use the selected diagnosed_diabetes direct-record sample_size as the fixed reliability weight, including source-perturbation fits.

cluster_jackknife.required_evidence: Full coefficient, every division deletion diagnostic, bias-corrected inference, and influence summary.

nested_elastic_net.required_evidence: Every outer fold, complete inner grid, selected lambda, nonzero count, coordinate-cycle checkpoint, outer RMSE, and pooled metrics.

wild_cluster_bootstrap.required_evidence: Observed statistic, all checkpoints, exceedance test, requested quantiles, and terminal generator state.

grouped_conformal.required_evidence: Every division calibration and interval diagnostic plus pooled coverage, width, and worst division.

trajectory_pca_clustering.required_evidence: Leading spectrum, initialization, update count, centroids, every state score and assignment, and all leave-year stability diagnostics.

exhaustive_source_perturbation.required_evidence: Registered source order, every scenario stratum, stability and maximum-shift summaries, and full exact Shapley attribution.

flags: cluster_jackknife_supported iff the bias-corrected coefficient is positive, jackknife p<0.05, and maximum delete-cluster percent change<=25.
nested_prediction_stable iff pooled outer OOF R2>=0.55.
trajectory_stable iff minimum leave-one-year adjusted Rand index>=0.55.
source_exhaustive_stable iff every scenario is stable and maximum absolute percent shift<=25.
